title: azure-kv: slash-in-secret error message doesn't explain constraint
description: When split_path returns None due to slash in secret name (e.g. secretx://azure-kv/vault/a/b), from_uri emits 'azure-kv URI requires vault name and secret name: secretx://azure-kv/<vault-name>/<secret-name>'. This doesn't explain the real constraint: Azure KV secret names cannot contain '/'. Users who try to pass a multi-segment name will file issues wondering why their URI format is wrong. Fix: improve from_uri to detect the slash case specifically and emit 'secret name must not contain / (Azure KV does not support nested secret names)'.
